caption: The video begins with a static title card featuring the official seal of the Office of the Prime Minister of Saint Lucia. The seal is prominently displayed in the center, surrounded by a circular border that reads "Office of the Prime Minister" and "Saint Lucia." Below the seal, text indicates that the video will feature an address given at the opening of the Interpretation Centre at Pigeon Island National Landmark. The scene remains unchanged throughout the initial frames, setting the stage for the formal event to follow. The design is clean and professional, emphasizing the significance of the occasion and the authority of the speaker.
